title: Millions Recovered in FIFA Corruption Scandal May Now Be Missing Again Before World Cup
summary_full: Ahead of the World Cup, the head of South American soccer faces an ethics complaint he received payments recovered from a 2015 investigation that shook global soccer.
summary_public: Ahead of the World Cup, the head of South American soccer faces an ethics complaint he received payments recovered from a 2015 investigation that shook global soccer.
